trails.name: Studholme Bush Scenic Reserve tracks
trails.description: Enjoy a wide range of tracks, from an easy, fun cycle with the family along Railway Track, to a steep 50-minute walk to the Whitehorse monument with great views out over Waimate.

trails.name: Talbot Forest Scenic Reserve tracks
trails.description: These short walks in and around Talbot Forest Scenic Reserve are ideal for families. There are four short walks through the forest which interconnect with roads around the reserve.
